content.body:
Leo now uses its own .leo/ directory for config, profiles, and KB,
matching the architecture it creates for other projects via `leo init`.

- Moved 19 KB docs, schema, index, and scripts from .claude/kb/ to .leo/kb/
- Created .leo/config.yaml and .leo/profiles/
- Updated hooks, CLAUDE.md bootloader, and project-config to reference .leo/
- Updated `leo update` and onboarding to read core source from .leo/kb/
- Removed .claude/kb/ (runtime files .claude/CLAUDE.md and settings.json remain)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
content.subject: refactor: migrate KB from .claude/kb/ to .leo/kb/ — dogfood Leo's own structure
